div.p: On December 27, 1949, the United States announced that talks would open with Cuba in February 1950 for renegotiation under the GATT of Cuban concessions on certain items negotiated originally in 1947; see Department of State Bulletin, January 9, 1950, page 58. For information on the results of the renegotiations which concluded on May 31, 1950, see ibid., June 12, 1950, page 980.
